Model v9.9
K Props · F5 · NRFI · methodology · v9.9 · multiplicative opp · hand-split K% · Real Savant Statcast
⚡ K Props — Strikeout Projection v9.9
L10-based 5-factor formula. Step 1 — Normalize: adj_k = raw_k × (22.7 / opp_K%) for each start. Step 2 — Base: Base = adj_L10 × w_adj + k9_proj × w_k9 where w is σ-driven (σ≤1.2 → 75/25, σ≤2.2 → 70/30, σ>2.2 → 58/42). k9_proj = (K/9 / 8.2) × avg_IP. Step 3 — Projection: base_proj = base×0.497 + (whiff%/25%)×base×0.229 + (matchup_put%/20.5%)×base×0.127 + (FPS%/63%)×base×0.076. Step 4 — proj = base_proj × rm_eff. rm_eff = 1 + (team_K%/LG_K% − 1) × HARD 1.00 / EASY 0.65 · hand-split · asymmetric · primary opp factor. Putaway also matchup-adjusted per pitch type (secondary opp layer). v9.9 change: asymmetric opp weight: hard lineups (K% < LG avg) suppressed at 1.00×, easy lineups boosted at 0.65×. Hard lineups now penalise more than easy lineups reward.
Adj L10 base · opp-normalized · σ-driven blend with K/9
53%
Opp K% mult · rm_eff = 1+(team_K%÷LG_K%−1)×0.65 · hand-split · multiplicative
×0.65
Whiff% vs lg avg (25%) — Savant real · strongest K predictor
25%
Matchup putaway — pitcher per-pitch putaway weighted by (pitcher whiff% × opp whiff%) per pitch type · both sides of two-strike equation · Savant pitcher + batter arsenal CSVs
14%
FPS% vs lg avg (63%) — command drives deep counts · Savant real
8%
Arsenal grades (display only, no formula effect): ELITE ≥32% whiff · STRONG ≥28% · MOD ≥22% · WEAK <22% · from Savant leaderboard CSV
CAP% = Poisson P(over) blended with σ-adjusted hit rate and K/9 anchor · edge% = (proj−line)/line
🎯 K Props Tiers
STRONG EDGEedge ≥+1.5 · ep ≥25% · CAP ≥62% — high-confidence over, large projected gap
MOD EDGEedge ≥+0.5 · ep ≥15% · CAP ≥58% — solid edge, moderate confidence
LEAN OVERedge ≥+0.5 · ep ≥10% · CAP ≥45% — soft edge, lower conviction
LEAN UNDERedge ≤−1.0 · CAP ≥20% — model projects below line with some confidence
UNDERedge ≤−1.0 · CAP ≥58% — high-confidence under, strong model signal
PASSedge or confidence below threshold — no play
Lines box: BP = Ballpark Pal sharp-book reference price (market implied probability anchor). FD Odds = FanDuel over price. EV% = expected value vs FD line using model probability. Alt lines sorted ascending.
Arsenal box: PITCH = pitch type · USE% = usage rate · WHF% = whiff rate (green ≥32% · amber ≥24% · grey <24%) · PUT badge = highest putaway pitch only. All from Savant Pitch Arsenal Stats leaderboard CSV.
🔴 F5 — First 5 Innings Run Projection v9.9
Run projection per team: blended_ERA = season×0.65 + L3×0.35 · sp_r = (blended_ERA/4.50) × 2.5 × park × fps_sup · lineup_r = (wRC+/100) × (L10 R/G/4.35) × 2.5 · total = sp_r×0.50 + lineup_r×0.50.
fps_sup = 1 − max(0, (FPS%−63)/150) — high FPS suppresses runs ALLOWED (on SP side). Previously FPS was applied to the lineup (wrong direction — v9.9 fix).
Win prob: logistic(hp−ap, slope=1.5). ERA blend = 40% season + 60% L5. Slope raised from 1.0→1.5 for sharper separation.
L5 ERA blend · fps_sup applied here (sp_r×fps_sup)
35%
wRC+ vs handedness · lineup quality
25%
L10 R/G · recent offensive form
20%
FPS% suppression factor on SP · fps_sup = 1−max(0,(FPS−63)/150)
12%
Park factor
8%
v9.9 changes vs v9.9: FPS moved from lineup multiplier → SP run suppression (bug fix) · logistic slope 1.0→1.5 · pitcher's own FPS paired with their own ERA (was wrong side)
Confidence: STRONG win prob ≥74% · MOD ≥67% · LEAN ≥60% · PASS <60%
🎯 NRFI — No Run First Inning
Poisson model. λ = (ERA/9) / (4.50/9) × lg_ERA_inn × (OBP/0.318) × (1−max(0,(FPS%−63)/200)) × park. P(half-inning scoreless) = e^−λ. P(NRFI) = P(away 0R) × P(home 0R). Away team bats vs home SP in top 1st; home team bats vs away SP in bottom 1st.
SP ERA — primary run prevention signal
35%
WHIP — baserunner rate
25%
Lineup OBP — top-4 batters on-base rate
20%
FPS% — first-pitch strikes suppress baserunners
12%
Park factor — run environment
8%
NRFI P≥70%  |  NRFI LEAN P≥62%  |  SKIP 51–62%  |  YRFI LEAN P≤50%  |  λ shown per half-inning · LOW/MOD/HIGH = lineup OBP risk
🎨 Color Guide
■ Neon green — STRONG tier · arsenal ELITE/best putaway · high CAP · NRFI plays
■ Amber — MOD tier · F5 moderate edge · NRFI LEAN · whiff 24–31%
■ Teal — LEAN OVER tier · soft edge plays
■ Purple — LEAN UNDER tier · YRFI LEAN · model below line, lower confidence
■ Red — UNDER tier · high-confidence under · OBP dangerzone in NRFI (≥.370)
■ Grey — PASS / insufficient data / league-average whiff / SKIP
Card borders: left-edge color = tier · inner stat colors follow same scale
WHF% colors: green ≥32% · amber ≥24% · grey <24%
OBP colors (NRFI): red ≥.370 · amber ≥.345 · grey <.345
Trend arrows: ↑ Hot L3 avg ≥ L10+1K · ↓ Cooling L3 avg ≤ L10−1K · → Consistent/Volatile
